channel.title: Projects on Arjun Sajeevan
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Arjun Sajeevan

item.title: Analytics Engineering with dbt & Databricks: Building a Production-Grade Data Warehouse
item.description: A complete, end-to-end analytics engineering project — transforming raw, messy e-commerce data into a clean, tested, and documented warehouse using dbt and Databricks Community Edition.

item.title: Data Engineering Foundations for Beginners: Your First Data Pipeline
item.description: A foundational batch processing pipeline that ingests raw, messy sales data, enforces schemas, executes data quality checks, and exports clean datasets. Perfect for beginners to practice!

item.title: Real-Time Streaming Analytics: Kafka & PySpark
item.description: A deep dive into building an event-driven data pipeline using Python, Docker, Apache Kafka, and PySpark Structured Streaming.
